items.title: VSCO launches Studio Pro mobile photo editing app and plans $500 per year subscription
items.description: VSCO is taking on Adobe with a new Studio Pro editing app rolling out today on iOS and coming to macOS later this year, as Bloomberg reports. At launch, the app offers tools for batch editing, style matching from a reference image, and sharing images through VSCO Galleries. VSCO says more features a...

items.title: Two-thirds of Americans think AI is advancing too quickly
items.description: According to the latest Pew Research poll, 49 percent of Americans report using chatbots at least occasionally, but 63 percent think the tech is advancing too quickly. Overall, use of AI chatbots has increased dramatically since 2024, when only 33 percent reported using them. Specifically, ChatGPT's...

items.title: SanDisk’s new PlayStation 5 SSD will cost you more than three PS5 Pros
items.description: SanDisk has announced an expensive way to boost the PlayStation 5's storage capacity. The largest option can store up to 200 PS5 games (based on average installation sizes) S...
